name: agentic-analyzer
description: Plugins that implement or support the agentic-analyzer pattern — LLM-judged, schema-validated, replayable code analyzers.

plugins.name: agentic-analyzer
plugins.description: Authoring kit: scaffolds new analyzer skills via an interactive `/new-analyzer` interview (with fixture auto-gen + post-stamp quality gate) and a companion `/expected-entities` command for feeding dev-team oracle lists into the Phase C.2 discovery backstop. Stamped analyzers record per-entity property bags (Phase D side-effect + Phase D.5 consolidation). Ships five specialist subagents and a generic runtime (validators, normalizer, comparators, replay engine).
